name: Logic Programming Semantics for Causal Processes

description: arXiv:2607.21233v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Motivated by challenging modelling issues in the life sciences, we investigate the relationship between logic programming semantics and the eventual states of causal processes compatible with those logic programs. More precisely, we show that while stable models of positive logic programs correspond to the eventual states of processes commencing f...
author: Felix Weitk\"amper
